technology.title: Nvidia CEO tries to explain why DLSS 5 isn’t just “AI slop”
technology.summary: If game makers don’t like it, “they could decide not to use it, you know?"

briefing.news_focus: If game makers don’t like it, “they could decide not to use it, you know?"
briefing.news_focus_zh: Nvidia CEO 在解釋 DLSS 5 的技術優勢時，強調其並非單純的「AI 垃圾」，並指出遊戲開發者若不喜歡該技術可選擇不使用。
briefing.background: DLSS（深度學習超取樣）技術是 Nvidia 推出的圖形增強技術，旨在提高遊戲性能與畫質。隨著遊戲市場對於高效能與高畫質需求的增加，Nvidia 持續推進其 AI 驅動的技術。然而，部分遊戲開發者對於 DLSS 的效果持保留態度，認為其可能影響遊戲的整體設計與玩家體驗。Nvidia 目前面臨的挑戰是如何平衡技術創新與開發者的實際需求。
briefing.analysis: Nvidia CEO 的言論反映出公司在推廣 DLSS 5 時的策略考量。對於遊戲開發者而言，DLSS 5 的採用可能影響其遊戲的視覺風格與性能表現，因此他們的反應至關重要。若開發者普遍拒絕使用，將可能削弱 Nvidia 在市場上的競爭力。此外，消費者對於遊戲畫質的期待也會影響開發者的決策，未來若能夠證明 DLSS 5 的優勢，或許能促使更多開發者採用這項技術。

supporting_titles: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang says ‘I think we’ve achieved AGI’

technology.title: Someone has publicly leaked an exploit kit that can hack millions of iPhones
technology.summary: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.

briefing.news_focus: Leaked "DarkSword" exploits published to GitHub allow hackers and cybercriminals to target iPhone users running old versions of iOS with spyware, according to cybersecurity researchers.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一套名為「DarkSword」的漏洞利用工具被公開洩露，黑客可利用該工具針對運行舊版iOS的iPhone用戶進行間諜軟體攻擊，這一消息引起了網絡安全研究人員的關注。
briefing.background: 隨著智能手機的普及，iOS系統的安全性成為了重要議題。蘋果公司定期推出更新以修補漏洞，但許多用戶仍然使用舊版系統，這使得他們面臨安全風險。此次洩露的「DarkSword」工具，可能是由於黑客社群對於舊版iOS的漏洞研究而產生，顯示出網絡攻擊手段的日益成熟與普遍化。
briefing.analysis: 這一事件對於蘋果公司、iPhone用戶及網絡安全行業均有深遠影響。蘋果需加強對於舊版系統用戶的安全警示與更新推廣，否則將面臨用戶信任度下降的風險。對於用戶而言，未更新系統的風險顯著增加，可能導致個人資料被竊取。網絡安全公司則可能因應此事件推出新的防護措施，進一步推動市場需求。

technology.title: Elizabeth Warren calls Pentagon’s decision to bar Anthropic ‘retaliation’
technology.summary: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.

briefing.news_focus: In a letter to Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) equated the DOD's decision to label Anthropic a "supply-chain risk" as retaliation, arguing that the Pentagon could simply have terminated its contract with the AI lab.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國參議員伊莉莎白·沃倫指責國防部將人工智慧實驗室Anthropic標記為供應鏈風險的決定是報復行為，並認為國防部本可以直接終止與該實驗室的合約。
briefing.background: 國防部對於供應鏈風險的評估在近年來受到重視，尤其是在科技與國家安全交集的領域。Anthropic作為一家專注於人工智慧的公司，與國防部的合作關係引發了外界的關注。沃倫的指控反映了對政府機構在科技領域行為透明度的質疑，並可能影響未來的政府合約與科技公司之間的關係。
briefing.analysis: 沃倫的指控揭示了科技公司與政府之間的緊張關係，特別是在國防與科技創新交匯的背景下。對於Anthropic來說，這一標記可能影響其商業運作與市場信譽。國防部的立場則可能基於對國家安全的考量，然而，這樣的行為也可能被解讀為對科技創新者的壓制。未來，若此事件引發更大範圍的爭議，可能會促使立法者重新檢視政府與科技公司的合作模式。

politics.title: Tuesday briefing: With the horror of conflict throughout the globe, how likely is world war three?
politics.summary: In today’s newsletter: Our diplomatic editor on how global instability feeds into conflict in so many parts of the world, and whether the threshold for a major global war has been met Good morning. The world is at war. From the trenches of eastern Ukraine to the missile-streaked skies of the Gulf, a growing proportion of humanity is living under the horror of conflict. For some observers, there are gnawing fears that the worst is yet to come. The apparent collapse of the rules-based international order, the irrelevance of institutions designed to uphold it, and the interconnectedness of the fighting have sparked warnings that we could be at the beginning of a third world war. Indeed, half of Britons polled in a recent YouGov survey thought world war three was likely in the next five to 10 years. On Monday, Donald Trump stepped back from deepening the US and Israel’s war with Iran, announcing that he would postpone military strikes on Iranian power plants for a five-day period after “very good and productive conversations” about the end to the fighting. Iran denied this version of events, claiming Trump had been scared off by their threats of attacks on water infrastructure in the Gulf. But, despite calmer stock markets and a sharp drop in the oil price, there is little sign that the fighting is near an end. Middle East | The Israeli military said it had launched a new wave of strikes on Tehran, after Donald Trump signalled a pause in US attacks against energy infrastructure after what he said were productive talks with Iran. UK Politics | Ministers are looking at providing support for household bills next winter, Keir Starmer said, as he suggested the energy price shock unleashed by the Iran conflict could continue for months to come . London | Security agencies are investigating whether a group linked to Iran is behind an arson attack on four ambulances belonging to a Jewish charity in north London. Climate crisis | More countries will face critical food insecurity if world heats up by 2C, analysis shows. New York | The pilot and co-pilot of an Air Canada Express regional jet have been killed after it collided with a fire truck while landing at New York’s LaGuardia airport. Continue reading...

The world is at war. From the trenches of eastern Ukraine to the missile-streaked skies of the Gulf, a growing proportion of humanity is living under the horror of conflict. For some observers, there are gnawing fears that the worst is yet to come. The apparent collapse of the rules-based international order, the irrelevance of institutions designed to uphold it, and the interconnectedness of the fighting have sparked warnings that we could be at the beginning of a third world war. Indeed, half of Britons polled in a recent YouGov survey thought world war three was likely in the next five to 10 years. On Monday, Donald Trump stepped back from deepening the US and Israel’s war with Iran, announcing that he would postpone military strikes on Iranian power plants for a five-day period after “very good and productive conversations” about the end to the fighting. Iran denied this version of events, claiming Trump had been scared off by their threats of attacks on water infrastructure in the Gulf. But, despite calmer stock markets and a sharp drop in the oil price, there is little sign that the fighting is near an end. Middle East | The Israeli military said it had launched a new wave of strikes on Tehran, after Donald Trump signalled a pause in US attacks against energy infrastructure after what he said were productive talks with Iran. UK Politics | Ministers are looking at providing support for household bills next winter, Keir Starmer said, as he suggested the energy price shock unleashed by the Iran conflict could continue for months to come . Climate crisis | More countries will face critical food insecurity if world heats up by 2C, analysis shows. New York | The pilot and co-pilot of an Air Canada Express regional jet have been killed after it collided with a fire truck while landing at New York’s LaGuardia airport. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 全球多地衝突加劇，引發對第三次世界大戰的擔憂。調查顯示，許多英國人認為未來五到十年內爆發世界大戰的可能性很高。美國總統特朗普在與伊朗進行對話後，暫時推遲對伊朗的軍事打擊，但中東局勢依然緊張。
briefing.background: 當前國際局勢不穩定，從烏克蘭到中東的衝突不斷升級，顯示出全球安全體系的脆弱。自冷戰結束以來，國際秩序的規則逐漸崩潰，國際機構的作用受到質疑。此背景下，地緣政治的互動與衝突愈發緊密，促使各國對潛在大規模戰爭的警惕性上升。
briefing.analysis: 各方在當前局勢中的利益動態複雜。英國民眾對第三次世界大戰的擔憂反映了對政府應對能力的質疑。特朗普的暫停軍事行動可能是出於對伊朗威脅的考量，但也可能是為了避免進一步激化衝突。伊朗則可能利用此機會強化其地區影響力，進一步挑戰美國的主導地位。這些動態可能導致全球安全形勢的持續惡化。

politics.title: US faces critical shortage of China expertise within a decade, report warns
politics.summary: The United States will face a “critical shortage” of China expertise within a decade that threatens to leave policymakers struggling to manage Washington’s most consequential strategic relationship, a report said on Monday. As China experts retire and the number of Americans studying in China sharply declines, the resulting talent gap presents a “national security and an economic competitiveness” problem, warned the report by an expert working group of the Washington-based non-profit US-China...

briefing.news_focus: The United States will face a “critical shortage” of China expertise within a decade that threatens to leave policymakers struggling to manage Washington’s most consequential strategic relationship, a report said on Monday. As China experts retire and the number of Americans studying in China sharply declines, the resulting talent gap presents a “national security and an economic competitiveness” problem, warned the report by an expert working group of the Washington-based non-profit US-China...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 一份報告指出，美國在未來十年內將面臨中國專家短缺的危機，這將影響政策制定者管理與中國的戰略關係，並對國家安全及經濟競爭力造成威脅。
briefing.background: 隨著中國在全球經濟和政治舞台上的影響力日益增強，美國對中國的專業知識需求也隨之增加。然而，報告指出，隨著中國專家的退休以及赴中國學習的美國學生人數大幅下降，未來將出現明顯的人才缺口。這一趨勢反映了美國在教育和外交政策上的挑戰，尤其是在與中國的競爭日益激烈的背景下。
briefing.analysis: 報告強調的專家短缺問題，將使美國在對華政策上面臨重大挑戰。政策制定者可能因缺乏深入的中國知識而無法有效應對與中國的經濟和安全議題。此情況可能導致美國在國際舞台上的競爭力下降，並可能加劇與中國的緊張關係。學術界和政府機構需加強合作，鼓勵更多美國學生學習中文及中國相關課程，以填補這一人才缺口。

politics.title: Strike in Iraq reportedly kills seven fighters – as it happened
politics.summary: This blog is closed. Follow our new liveblog here. British prime minister Keir Starmer is set to chair an emergency meeting on the economic fallout from the war in Iran on Monday , with chancellor of the exchequer Rachel Reeves and Bank of England governor Andrew Bailey also attending, the UK government has said. Financial markets face another turbulent week after Iran said it would strike its Gulf neighbours’ energy and water systems if Donald Trump followed through on his threat to “obliterate” Iran’s power plants if it doesn’t fully open up the crucial strait of Hormuz. Topics expected to be covered are the economic impact of the crisis on families and businesses, energy security and the resilience of industry and supply chains alongside the international response. Continue reading...

Financial markets face another turbulent week after Iran said it would strike its Gulf neighbours’ energy and water systems if Donald Trump followed through on his threat to “obliterate” Iran’s power plants if it doesn’t fully open up the crucial strait of Hormuz. Topics expected to be covered are the economic impact of the crisis on families and businesses, energy security and the resilience of industry and supply chains alongside the international response. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊拉克的空襲事件造成七名武裝分子死亡，英國首相基爾·斯塔默將召開緊急會議，討論伊朗戰爭對經濟的影響，並預測金融市場將面臨動盪。
briefing.background: 近期伊朗與其海灣鄰國之間的緊張局勢加劇，特別是在霍爾木茲海峽的戰略重要性上。伊朗威脅若美國對其電力設施採取行動，將會反擊其鄰國的能源和水系統。這一系列事件使得英國政府必須迅速應對潛在的經濟衝擊，特別是在能源安全和供應鏈的穩定性方面。
briefing.analysis: 英國政府面臨的挑戰在於如何平衡國內經濟穩定與國際安全的需求。首相斯塔默及其內閣成員的會議將聚焦於家庭和企業的經濟影響，顯示出政府對於民生問題的重視。金融市場的不穩定可能會引發投資者的恐慌，進而影響英國的經濟復甦。伊朗的威脅則可能使地區局勢更加複雜，增加國際社會對於能源供應的擔憂。

economy.title: UK mortgage interest rates expected to rise despite Trump’s Iran pause
economy.summary: Bank of England likely to make two quarter-point increases amid sustained rise in inflation, investors believe Business live – latest updates ‘Trumpflation’: how the Iran war’s economic storm could affect Britons Homeowners’ choice of mortgage deals has shrunk and interest rates on home loans are expected to rise this week despite financial markets reacting positively to Donald Trump’s pause on his threat to attack Iranian power plants. Early on Monday, as the end of a two-day deadline set by Trump for a deal with Iran grew closer, financial market data implied that investors believed the Bank of England would attempt to tackle rising prices with four quarter-point increases in rates before the end of December. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Bank of England likely to make two quarter-point increases amid sustained rise in inflation, investors believe Business live – latest updates ‘Trumpflation’: how the Iran war’s economic storm could affect Britons Homeowners’ choice of mortgage deals has shrunk and interest rates on home loans are expected to rise this week despite financial markets reacting positively to Donald Trump’s pause on his threat to attack Iranian power plants. Early on Monday, as the end of a two-day deadline set by Trump for a deal with Iran grew closer, financial market data implied that investors believed the Bank of England would attempt to tackle rising prices with four quarter-point increases in rates before the end of December. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 英國的抵押貸款利率預計將上升，儘管特朗普暫停對伊朗的攻擊威脅。英格蘭銀行可能會在通脹持續上升的情況下，進行兩次四分之一點的加息，導致房主可選擇的抵押貸款方案減少。
briefing.background: 英國的通脹率持續上升，迫使英格蘭銀行考慮加息以穩定經濟。特朗普對伊朗的政策變化雖然在短期內使金融市場反應積極，但並未改變英國面臨的內部經濟挑戰。過去幾年，英國的抵押貸款市場因利率低迷而繁榮，但隨著利率上升，房主的選擇將受到限制。
briefing.analysis: 英格蘭銀行的加息決策將直接影響房主和潛在買家的負擔能力，可能導致房地產市場冷卻。投資者對於通脹的擔憂使他們預期進一步加息，而特朗普的政策暫停雖然短期內緩解了市場的不安，但並未根本解決英國的經濟問題。這可能導致不同利益方之間的緊張關係，特別是在房地產開發商和購房者之間。

economy.title: Australia and EU agree sweeping trade deal in face of global uncertainty
economy.summary: Australia and the EU sign sweeping trade and security deals after years of negotiations.

briefing.news_focus: Australia and the EU sign sweeping trade and security deals after years of negotiations.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 澳洲與歐盟在經過多年談判後，簽署了全面的貿易與安全協議，旨在應對全球不確定性。
briefing.background: 澳洲與歐盟的貿易協議是雙方在面對全球經濟不穩定及地緣政治緊張局勢下的重要舉措。此協議不僅涵蓋貿易，還包括安全合作，反映出雙方對於加強經濟聯繫及共同應對挑戰的迫切需求。過去幾年，隨著中國影響力的上升，澳洲及歐盟都在尋求多元化其貿易夥伴，以降低對單一市場的依賴。
briefing.analysis: 此協議對於澳洲來說，將有助於擴大其出口市場，特別是在農產品及服務領域，並可能吸引更多外資。而對於歐盟，則是加強其在亞太地區的經濟影響力，並提升其在全球貿易中的競爭力。然而，協議的實施仍需克服各自內部的政治阻力，特別是在農業補貼及市場准入等敏感議題上，可能會引發不同利益方的反對聲音。

economy.title: Trump rows back on strait of Hormuz threat – what next? | podcast
economy.summary: The US president has extended by five days his deadline to ‘hit and obliterate’ Iran’s power stations and energy infrastructure if Tehran does not allow shipping to move freely. Pippa Crerar and Kiran Stacey discuss what is behind this change of tone and the impact the uncertainty will have on the cost of living in the UK. Plus, with just over six weeks until the local elections, they talk through what to watch as the results come in Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: The US president has extended by five days his deadline to ‘hit and obliterate’ Iran’s power stations and energy infrastructure if Tehran does not allow shipping to move freely. Pippa Crerar and Kiran Stacey discuss what is behind this change of tone and the impact the uncertainty will have on the cost of living in the UK. Plus, with just over six weeks until the local elections, they talk through what to watch as the results come in Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國總統特朗普延長對伊朗威脅的最後期限，若伊朗不允許航運自由通行，將對其電力設施進行打擊。此舉引發對英國生活成本的影響討論，並在即將到來的地方選舉中引發關注。
briefing.background: 霍爾木茲海峽是全球重要的石油運輸通道，任何對該地區的軍事行動都可能影響全球能源市場。美國與伊朗的緊張關係持續升溫，特朗普政府曾多次對伊朗施加經濟制裁，並威脅軍事行動。此時延長最後期限，可能反映出美方在考量國內外壓力及即將到來的選舉情勢。
briefing.analysis: 特朗普的改變語氣可能是出於對國內經濟影響的考量，尤其是在英國生活成本上升的背景下，這可能會引發選民的不滿。對於伊朗而言，這一威脅的延續意味著持續的地緣政治不確定性，可能影響其經濟與能源出口。英國政府則需密切關注此事對國內經濟的潛在影響，特別是在即將舉行的地方選舉中，選民對生活成本的反應將成為焦點。

theme_of_day: 今日新聞的整體敘事主軸圍繞全球地緣政治緊張與科技發展的相互影響，特別是美國在中東的軍事策略與國內科技政策的交錯。Nvidia的技術創新與網絡安全漏洞的洩露，反映出科技領域在當前政治動盪中所面臨的挑戰；同時，美國對中國專家短缺的擔憂也顯示出在經濟競爭中，科技與政策的密切關聯。面對全球不確定性，英國的經濟狀況與國際貿易協議亦成為焦點，突顯出政治決策對經濟環境的深遠影響。
